match.userMessage:
9-panel cinematic storyboard sheet derived from Image 1. Mix Wide, Medium, and Tight shots of the same scene. No borders between panels.

Layout: 3x3 grid (9 panels) in a 16:9 landscape image.

Scene: Modern social-first cinematic lifestyle photograph of SCARLETT wearing light casual beach clothing suitable for walking and carrying a canvas tote bag, captured mid-stride on the open seaside promenade in a moment of potential energy while glancing back toward camera before turning toward the sand path, turquoise ocean and surfers rolling in the softly blurred distance, open coastal walkway with bright daylight tones and lively breezy beachside atmosphere, bright natural daylight with clean directional shadows and warm highlights, shallow depth of field keeping focus on the subject against vibrant background, handheld eye-level framing with natural micro-movement, fresh sensory and effortlessly cool energy, true-to-life color grading with crisp whites and airy lifted shadows

Match Image 1 exactly: same character(s) (face, hair, skin, clothing), lighting, color grade, and texture. If character reference sheets are provided, use them for likeness — do not render them as separate panels.

No text, dialogue bubbles, scene numbers, or watermarks.


  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [PRIMARY SOURCE]: Primary source scene — generate 9 variant shots from this image
    - Image 2 [CHARACTER REF]: Scarlett - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 3 [LOCATION REF]: EXT. BONDI PROMENADE - DAY - Open seaside promenade with views of turquoise ocean and surfers in the background
    
    IMPORTANT: Character, location, and element reference images are for IDENTITY CONSISTENCY ONLY. Do NOT reproduce them as separate panels or subjects. Elements (logos, products) must render faithfully when referenced but should appear naturally within the scene. All output panels must depict the scene from the PRIMARY SOURCE image.
  </reference-images>
